CREATE TABLE test_html (id INT, content VARCHAR(1000));

INSERT INTO test_html (id, content) VALUES (2, '

Another Test

With Span');
SELECT tidy_html(content) FROM test_html WHERE id = 1;
SELECT tidy_html(content) FROM test_html WHERE id IN (1, 2);
SELECT tidy_html(content) FROM test_html WHERE content IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, tidy_html(content) AS tidy_content FROM test_html WHERE LENGTH(content) < 500;

SELECT id, tidy_html(content) AS tidy_content FROM test_html WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_html WHERE content LIKE '%

%');
SELECT t1.id, tidy_html(t2.content) FROM test_html t1 JOIN test_html t2 ON t1.id = t2.id WHERE t1.id < 3;
WITH formatted AS (SELECT id, tidy_html(content) AS tidy_content FROM test_html) SELECT * FROM formatted WHERE id = 3;
SELECT id, tidy_html(content) FROM (SELECT * FROM test_html WHERE id <> 2) AS subquery;
SELECT COUNT(*), tidy_html(content) FROM test_html GROUP BY content;
DELETE FROM test_html WHERE id = (SELECT MIN(id) FROM test_html);
UPDATE test_html SET content = tidy_html(content) WHERE content IS NOT NULL;
